update_gdpr_settings maps unspecified/mosaic/black to enum; unknown name returns status=error with zero wire calls (test_update_unknown_mask_errors). Corpus: UpdateGDPRSettings is tested-warn-fixture-needed; UpdateBookmarkSettings is tested-pass.
